notes: Topic tree for human navigation in the viewer. Independent of the class/superclass hierarchy and of any schema semantics; intended only to group related schemas by subject area, mirroring the directory layout used by the original NDI-matlab document_data tree. Editing this file does not affect schema validation or document classes. Classes not listed below appear under 'Uncategorized' in the viewer. The top-level 'classes' array holds classes that should appear as bare leaves at the root (no folder); 'topics' holds folder categories. Entries at each level are alphabetized, except that 'base' is pinned as the first top-level entry and 'meta' is pinned as the second.

topics.name: meta
topics.description: Meta-schemas and reserved-keyword registries that describe the schema framework itself.

children.name: markgarbage
children.description: Valid-interval annotations from the markgarbage app.

children.name: vhlab_voltage2firingrate
children.description: Vm-to-firing-rate fitting and residuals (vhlab voltage2firingrate app).

topics.name: calculators
topics.description: Derived-quantity calculator documents (_calc). Most pair with a stimulus-response schema in stimulus/.

topics.name: daq
topics.description: Data acquisition systems, readers, file navigation, sync, and epoch bookkeeping.

topics.name: data
topics.description: Generic data containers: time series, grids, images, fits, measurements, and generic file/directory wrappers.

topics.name: element
topics.description: Logical recorded elements (channels, neurons) and their epoch data.

topics.name: metadata
topics.description: External-ontology bindings (openMINDS, ontology lookups) and metadata editing.

topics.name: probe
topics.description: Probe geometry, electrode mapping, and physical placement.

topics.name: sorting
topics.description: Spike extraction, sorting, clusters, and waveforms.

topics.name: stimulus
topics.description: Stimulus descriptions, presentations, and stimulus-locked responses.

children.name: visual
children.description: Visual-stimulus tuning curves and reverse correlation.

topics.name: subject
topics.description: Subjects, subject groups, treatments, and interventions.
